title: bus subscriber task never started in main.rs
description: bus.rs documents a subscriber task pattern (let mut sub = bus.subscribe(); while let Some(msg) = sub.recv()) but main.rs never spawns it. BusMessage::Direct has no code path that publishes it, and nothing receives Broadcast messages from the bus. For the LocalBus/single-instance this is a no-op, but the redis-bus feature path would silently fail to re-deliver cross-instance messages. The subscriber task architecture is dead infrastructure that will mislead a future redis-bus contributor into thinking multi-instance delivery works.
